response:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS flight_count
FROM flights f
JOIN airports a_dep ON f.departure_airport_id = a_dep.airport_id
JOIN cities c_dep ON a_dep.city_id = c_dep.city_id
JOIN airports a_arr ON f.arrival_airport_id = a_arr.airport_id
JOIN cities c_arr ON a_arr.city_id = c_arr.city_id
WHERE c_dep.city_name = 'Aberdeen'
  AND c_arr.city_name = 'Ashley';
